decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 stability vs Canvas feature expansion
decisions.context: Multiple critical bugs in Explore V2 (ENG-9384, 9378, 9386, 9387, 9389, 8293) suggest UX instability. Canvas work (ENG-9337, 8031) competes for eng resources. Must decide: fix core or push features.

arguments.for: Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar. Decisions Captured drops if users hit bugs. Signal>Evidence: 8 P0/P1 bugs in 2 weeks suggests core isn't nailed.
arguments.against: Canvas differentiation needed for Q2 enterprise deals. Delay risks competitive position. Team can parallelize if we staff up.

decisions.title: Ship SSO/Enterprise Security package by Q2 or delay for product-market fit
decisions.context: Heavy security/compliance work queued (ENG-9301, 9308, 9319, 9320, 9321, 9322, 8157). Signals enterprise demand but diverts from core product innovation.

arguments.for: 'Embed Deeper' pillar requires enterprise trust. SSO/compliance unlocks 3 blocked deals worth $1.2M ARR. Table stakes for F500.
arguments.against: Doesn't increase Decisions Captured per customer—just expands TAM. Could partner with security vendors vs build. 6 eng-weeks of opportunity cost.

decisions.title: Commit to Python Rules GA date or keep in beta
decisions.context: No Python Rules signals in ticket list despite being 2026 key product. Unclear if we're building, iterating, or paused. Impacts 'Build the Moat' narrative.
decisions.blockedBy: No engineering tickets visible; unclear if resourcing exists or feature is deprioritized

arguments.for: Python Rules is moat differentiation vs Sigma/Looker. Decisioning requires programmatic logic. Beta feedback is strong.
arguments.against: Low signal volume suggests deprioritization. May need data governance foundation first (ENG-9070). Risk shipping half-baked.

decisions.title: Define 'Decision' instrumentation standard for North Star tracking
decisions.context: North Star is Decisions Captured Per Customer but no tickets show decision-tracking instrumentation. Can't manage what we don't measure.

arguments.for: Strategy lives/dies on North Star clarity. Need semantic definition: what counts as 'decision'? Rule execution? Report export? Canvas share?
arguments.against: Premature optimization—focus on building features users love, measure later. Instrumentation can be retro-fitted.

decisions.title: Consolidate family stats work or split into separate product
decisions.context: Family stats appears in 4+ tickets (ENG-7954, 9067, 7857, 9378) across multiple contexts. Unclear if this is a feature or a product pillar.

arguments.for: Recurring signals suggest core user need. Could be 'Ask SIFT' foundation—natural language to family insights. Aligns with Signal>Evidence pattern.
arguments.against: Scope creep risk. Family stats might be infrastructure, not user-facing product. Don't over-index on eng convenience vs customer value.

northStar.name: Decisions Captured Per Customer
northStar.delta: No instrumentation visible in eng tickets

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy engineering sync load; suggest async standups to reclaim 4h/week for deep work on core stability decisions.
alerts: No Python Rules or Ask SIFT tickets visible—check if teams are blocked or deprioritized
